announcements.text: Buy 2 or more patterns and save 20% — applied automatically at checkout!
New patterns added regularly — follow me on Instagram!
Crochet patterns at the lowest prices
Play my Memory Match game and win a discount!

shop.about: Hi there! I'm Hannah. I first learned to crochet from my mom when I was nine, and a few years later I discovered amigurumi — and I've been hooked ever since! I love the whole craft of bringing little stuffed animals to life, from designing patterns to crocheting custom plushies. Most of my patterns are beginner-friendly with plenty of photos, and many include video tutorials to help you along the way.

testimonials.name: Leah
testimonials.text: Really well written pattern and a lovely design. I am so pleased with my axolotl and I will be making more!

testimonials.name: Amanda
testimonials.text: This crocheted item is very good quality and well crafted. I'm always worried that crocheted toys won't hold up, but this one will get a lot of play time and the eyes are very very secure. Very impressed!

testimonials.name: Amelia
testimonials.text: Fantastic pattern, make up quickly in just a few hours! Lovely presentation and links to videos if needed, I've never made a plushie this way so it was a fresh difference from all the other patterns. Plenty of informational photos too!!

categories.name: Plushies & More
categories.description: Handmade crochet plushies and physical items
